title: AntiGEO Override
description: Schema for local override rules used by downstream projects or users when consuming AntiGEO release data.

version.description: Version of the override file format.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the override rule.

match_type.description: Type of target matcher used by the rule.

match_value.description: Value matched by the rule, such as an entity id or a domain string.

action.description: Local action applied when the rule matches.

reason.description: Short explanation for why the local override rule exists.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the override rule was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the override rule was last updated.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about the override rule.

source.description: Optional lightweight source label describing where the override rule came from.

enabled.description: Whether the override rule is currently enabled.
